title: Design System: FZS 数据同步平台 Documentation & Marketing Site

display.purpose: Hero H1 on marketing pages. One per page. Outfit geometric sans.

headline.purpose: Section headings (H2). Outfit for marketing, Noto Sans SC for docs.

title.purpose: Sub-section headings (H3), card titles, nav section headers.

body.purpose: Marketing prose and documentation body. Max line length 65–75ch.

shadows.name: fzs-shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle ambient lift for small interactive elements.

shadows.name: fzs-shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Card hover lift. The primary interaction shadow.

shadows.name: fzs-shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Elevated panels, dropdowns, modal surfaces, primary CTA hover.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Primary easing for card hover transforms, CTA transitions (320–360ms).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for secondary button state changes (180ms).

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Hero and section-level primary call-to-action. Asymmetric padding with arrow pill on right.
components.html: 了解产品
components.css: .ds-cta-primary { background-color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); border: 1px solid oklch(40% 0.16 25); color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 0.85rem 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 6px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.85rem; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 360ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), background-color 360ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), box-shadow 360ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-cta-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(33% 0.170 25); border-color: oklch(33% 0.170 25); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 14px 36px oklch(40% 0.10 25 / 0.14); } .ds-cta-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-cta-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, oklch(40% 0.16 25) 40%, white); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-cta-arrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.9rem; height: 1.9rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); transition: transform 360ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-cta-primary:hover .ds-cta-arrow { transform: translate(2px, -1px); }

components.name: Secondary CTA Button
components.description: Secondary call-to-action. Ghost style with border that reveals brand color on hover.
components.css: .ds-cta-secondary { background-color: transparent; border: 2px solid oklch(91% 0.007 50); color: oklch(18% 0.012 30); font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 6px; display: inline-block; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-cta-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-cta-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-cta-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, oklch(40% 0.16 25) 40%, white); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Navigation Card
components.description: Interactive link card used in the Explore section. Icon + title + description.
components.html:
产品介绍

查看 FZS 的核心能力、部署方式和适用场景
components.css: .ds-nav-card { display: block; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.007 50); background: oklch(99.2% 0.003 50); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 320ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), border-color 320ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), box-shadow 320ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-nav-card:hover { border-color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px oklch(40% 0.08 25 / 0.10); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-nav-card:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, oklch(40% 0.16 25) 40%, white); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-nav-card:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-nav-icon { color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); display: inline-flex; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-nav-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; color: oklch(18% 0.012 30); } .ds-nav-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: oklch(52% 0.010 35); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Industry Card
components.description: Industry vertical card with centered icon, title, and description. Used in the industries section.
components.html:
证券

交易系统容灾、行情数据实时同步、监管数据报送
components.css: .ds-industry-card { padding: 2rem; text-align: center; border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(99.2% 0.003 50); border: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.007 50); font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 320ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), border-color 320ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), box-shadow 320ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-industry-card:hover { border-color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px oklch(40% 0.08 25 / 0.10); } .ds-industry-icon { color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); display: inline-flex; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-industry-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; color: oklch(18% 0.012 30); } .ds-industry-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: oklch(52% 0.010 35); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Stats Bar Item
components.description: Individual stat item in the hero stats bar. Big crimson number + small muted label.
components.css: .ds-stat-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.4rem); font-weight: 800; color: oklch(40% 0.16 25); line-height: 1.2; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.9rem; color: oklch(52% 0.010 35); margin-top: 0.25rem; }

narrative.overview:
Where the fzs-slides deck is "The Instrument Panel" — a calibrated readout for a meeting-room projector — the website is the same instrument made browsable. A financial IT director evaluating data synchronization infrastructure opens this site at a desk, probably with two tabs open and a half-formed opinion about the vendor already. The design must clear that bar in under five seconds: technical depth is evident, claims are specific, and the visual system communicates the same precision as the product itself.

The color system derives from the 九桥同步 logo's brushstroke: a deep crimson at oklch(40% 0.16 25) anchors every structural landmark. Typography uses a two-font system: Outfit for display/headline hierarchy and Noto Sans SC for body and UI. This design explicitly rejects: SaaS-startup sky blue, decorative gradients, border-left accent stripes, the ghost-card pattern, and the DSG Data / info2soft aesthetic of cluttered enterprise catalogs.
keyCharacteristics: Brand crimson as structural color: navbar, hero accent, primary CTA, table headers, active nav indicators
Warm near-white ground: oklch(97.5% 0.005 50) — never pure #fff, never sky-tinted
Dual-font system: Outfit (display + headlines) paired with Noto Sans SC (body + UI)
Flat at rest, intentional shadows on interaction: crimson-tinted shadow tokens lift cards on hover only
Full dark-mode: deep warm charcoal ground with lightened brand crimson as primary
Chinese-first typesetting: CJK line-break rules, strict line-length for prose

rules.name: The Logo Rule
rules.body: Brand Crimson is the 九桥同步 logo color, not a UX accent chosen for sky-blue "tech" associations. Any element that currently uses the Docusaurus sky blue is using an inherited default, not a brand color.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: There is no second decorative accent color. Status colors (green/amber/red/blue) are functional only — sync state, severity indicators. Never use them for decoration or brand emphasis.

rules.name: The No Gradient Rule
rules.body: No background-clip: text gradient fills on headings. No decorative linear-gradient hero backgrounds. Background gradients may appear only as a very subtle structural layering tool (max two stops, same hue family, ≤10% lightness difference).

rules.name: The Chinese-First Rule
rules.body: Font sizing, line-height, and weight decisions are calibrated for Simplified Chinese glyphs, then verified for Latin fallback. No typeface chosen for Latin appeal and treating Chinese as an afterthought.

rules.name: The Weight-Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight jumps of ≥100 between adjacent levels. 800→700→600→400 for the full marketing stack.

rules.name: The Crimson-Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows are tinted toward the brand hue, not pure black. fzs-shadow-md uses oklch(40% 0.08 25 / 0.10) — crimson, not neutral gray.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only on hover or for functional layering (dropdowns/modals). Any resting shadow on a card or button is a design error.

rules.name: The Ghost-Card Ban
rules.body: border: 1px solid X and box-shadow with blur ≥ 16px on the same element is prohibited. Pick one: a single solid border, OR a defined shadow at max 8px blur (for hover). Never both as decoration.

dos: Do use Brand Crimson in structural roles: navbar active link, hero heading accent, primary buttons, doc table header rows, CTA band backgrounds.
Do use the warm near-white Ground (oklch(97.5% 0.005 50)) as the page background on marketing pages.
Do match fzs-slides: table headers in Brand Crimson, status colors functional only, no decorative gradients.
Do verify contrast at every step. Body text (Ink on Ground) must clear 4.5:1. Dark-mode brand on dark ground must also clear 4.5:1.
Do keep all borders 1px in Divider color.
Do use Fira Code for all code contexts — same as fzs-slides.
Do keep marketing page headings at text-wrap: balance and body text at text-wrap: pretty.
donts: Don't use sky blue (#0284c7 or any Docusaurus Sky palette value) as a brand color. Replace with Brand Crimson.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient on headings.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use wide drop shadows (blur ≥ 16px) on buttons or cards at rest. The ghost-card pattern is banned.
Don't use border-radius greater than 12px on cards. Pill shapes reserved for tags and badges only.
Don't use SaaS startup aesthetics: pastel-tinted sections, hero-metric grids, identical card grids. Avoid info2soft.cn patterns.
Don't use pure #ffffff or #000000. Every neutral is warm-tinted toward the brand hue.
Don't use the DSG Data aesthetic (dsgdata.com): cluttered banner sliders, no hierarchy, dated enterprise language.
